basis.basis_note: official = E[T]*K_cal = E[T]/W = K_cal*et_tau/S = 481.53 (resid 0). honest wall W=1/K_cal=7982.9us = read 3037.2us (38%) + non-read slack 4945.7us (62%); slack = draft 731.8 + verify-above-read 2104.6 + host/other 2109.3 (#283 vmxuwxm0).

caveats.greedy_safe: 'hideable' = OVERLAP-schedulable latency (graph fusion / kernel concurrency), greedy-SAFE because it changes latency only, NOT arithmetic. This is distinct from kanna #280's *reducing* MLP compute (reassociation-gated, greedy-UNSAFE).
caveats.launch_gate: the launch gate stays land #245's MEASURED >=500 at lambda_hat>=0.9780 AND PPL<=2.42, human-approval-gated.
caveats.optimistic_replaced: #283's 746.9 was an OPTIMISTIC all-hides upper bound; this leg replaces it with the measured-fraction floor (487.7).
caveats.reconciled_basis: the honest floor is computed in ONE reconciled basis (honest wall) via the phi_WS composition-compression bridge; the verify-side bridge ~ 1.0 is load-bearing -- we do NOT mix in the draft-side 0.21 over-credit.
caveats.zero_tps: This leg adds 0 TPS -- it prices the overlap-hideable fraction of existing verify compute and lands the honest kernel-addressable floor; it realizes no overlap and does not change the served checkpoint.

exposed_diagnostic.note: DIAGNOSTIC (M=8, transparency only): the verify-above-body-read decomposes into irreducible non-body memory (KV cache + activations, ~317us) + above-roofline exposed compute/overhead (~2082us). Only the SDPA-retune slice of the latter is greedy-SAFE overlap-hideable; the rest is exposed (serial).

gpu_probe.note: fresh CUDA-event reduction over 1.76 GB fp16 (reuses #283 read-floor probe).

synthesis.handoff: Of the 2104.6us verify-above-read compute, 0.048 (4.8%) is overlap-hideable (greedy-safe = the SDPA num_stages lever), landing the honest kernel-addressable floor at 487.7 TPS (in [487.7, 746.9]), so a free non-build step lane to >=500 does NOT exist -- confirming the step-side is definitively closed and the human-gated build is the sole >500 path, replacing #283's optimistic all-hides 746.9 with the measured-fraction floor.

component_rows.classification: greedy-UNSAFE to retune (int4 GEMM: num_warps/BLOCK_K/split-K REASSOCIATE bf16 partials -> E[T] may drift; near-roofline already)

hideability.hideable_note: verify_compute_hideable = the ONLY greedy-SAFE overlap-schedulable verify lever = SDPA num_stages 3->2 (bit-identical) = 15.48us normalized (bridge_verify 1.0) = 101.5us wall = 4.8% of the 2104.6us verify-above-read. The other 95.2% is EXPOSED: irreducible non-body memory (KV+activations), greedy-UNSAFE-to-reduce MLP/GEMV compute (near-roofline, reassociation-gated), and exposed low-AI SDPA softmax. 'hideable' = OVERLAP-schedulable latency (greedy-safe), NOT kanna #280's greedy-UNSAFE compute reduction. The all-hides 746.9 (ALL 2104.6us hides) was #283's OPTIMISTIC upper bound.

honest_floor.floor_note: remove ONLY the greedy-safe overlap-hideable verify compute (101.5us) from the honest wall -> tps_kernel_floor_honest = 487.7, COINCIDING with wirbel #285's free lossless floor (the only greedy-safe overlap lever IS the SDPA num_stages lever). free_lane_to_500 = FALSE: reaching 500 needs ~2.9x the only greedy-safe lever (no candidate exists). The step-side is DEFINITIVELY CLOSED; the human-gated E[T]-raise build (fern #281: E[T]>=3.991) is the sole >500 path.

reconciliation.phi_ws_note: phi_WS = W/S = 7982.9/1218.2 = 6.5530 maps normalized-step us <-> honest-wall us: dW = phi_WS * dS for the SAME TPS (the factor cancels in TPS, so both bases round-trip 481.53 exactly). This is the composition-compression ratio, NOT a bridge discount.
reconciliation.reconcile_note: common basis = honest wall. tps_free_lossless 487.7 (wirbel #285) removes 15.48us normalized == 101.5us wall; tps_all_compute_hides 746.9 (#283) removes 2836.3us wall == 432.8us normalized. Both round-trip in both bases via phi_WS. The honest floor lands BETWEEN them, set by the overlap-hideable fraction of the 2104.6us verify-above-read.
reconciliation.verify_bridge_note: the verify-above-read block is DEPLOYED-M8 VERIFY-SIDE -> kanna #286 verify bridge ~ 1.0 (deployed-M8 verify per-seq 1129.6us ~ S=1218.2us); a verify saving gets FULL normalized-step credit. We do NOT apply the draft-side 0.21 (that 4.66x over-credit is for batch=1 DRAFT wall savings; this block is verify-side).

synthesis.verdict: THE STEP-SIDE IS DEFINITIVELY CLOSED -- THE HONEST KERNEL-ADDRESSABLE FLOOR IS 487.7 TPS, COINCIDING WITH wirbel #285's FREE LOSSLESS 487.7. Of the 2104.6us verify-above-read compute, only 4.8% (101.5us wall) is greedy-SAFE overlap-hideable -- the SDPA num_stages 3->2 cp.async retune (bit-identical), which is the ONLY overlap-schedulable lever in the deployed (already-ONEGRAPH, fused-epilogue) verify. The other 95.2% is EXPOSED: irreducible non-body memory (KV+activations), greedy-UNSAFE-to-reduce MLP/GEMV compute (near-roofline, reassociation-gated per kanna #280), and exposed low-AI SDPA softmax. So #283's optimistic all-hides 746.9 (which assumed ALL 2104.6us hides) over-credited the verify-above-read by ~259 TPS; the honest floor is 487.7. free_lane_to_500_exists = False (reaching 500 needs ~2.9x the only greedy-safe lever; no candidate exists). The build is the sole >500 path (reinforcing fern #281 / land #245). BASELINE 481.53 untouched; analysis-only; adds 0 TPS; NOT a launch; the gate remains a MEASURED >=500 build, human-approval-gated.
